hero.title: Managing your association, finally simple.
hero.subtitle: Members, dues, meetings, finances — all in one place. Built for African organizations: Orange Money, MTN, PayCard, Soutra Money and WhatsApp sharing.

problem.title: Running an association shouldn't be a headache.

pains.notebook: A notebook, texts, your memory — and it can all disappear overnight.
pains.tracking: Who paid their dues? Who's late? Impossible to know without recounting everything.
pains.trust: Without transparency, trust erodes between members.

beforeAfter.title: From scrambling to peace of mind.

without.label: Without AssoHub
without.item1: Notebooks and files scattered around, lost at the first mishap.
without.item2: "Who paid?" — hours spent recounting everything by hand.
without.item3: Follow-ups one by one, member by member.
without.item4: A financial summary improvised in a panic before the AGM.
without.item5: Everything relies on one person's memory.

with.label: With AssoHub
with.item1: All your data centralized and secure.
with.item2: Who paid, who's late: visible at a glance.
with.item3: Bulk follow-up by email or WhatsApp in one click.
with.item4: Financial PDF report ready in seconds.
with.item5: Continuity guaranteed, even when the board changes.

solution.title: AssoHub brings together everything your association needs.

members.title: Members
members.description: Your complete directory. Invite members by email or a simple WhatsApp link.

cotisations.title: Dues
cotisations.description: Track who's paid, collect via Orange Money, MTN, PayCard or Soutra Money, follow up with latecomers in one click.

meetings.title: Meetings & Minutes
meetings.description: Schedule meetings, track attendance, write up your minutes.

reports.title: Financial reports
reports.description: Revenue, expenses, balance — and a PDF report ready for your AGM or funders.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Everything essential about your association at a glance.

mobileMoney.title: Mobile money built in
mobileMoney.description: Orange Money, MTN MoMo, PayCard, Soutra Money.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp at the core
whatsapp.description: Invite and follow up through the channel everyone already uses.

mobileFirst.title: Built mobile-first
mobileFirst.description: Manage your association from your phone.

security.title: Your data, secure
security.description: No more notebooks that can get lost.

payments.label: Orange Money, MTN, PayCard, Soutra Money

createOrg.title: Create your organization
createOrg.description: Sign up and create your association's space.

addMembers.title: Add your members
addMembers.description: By email or a shareable WhatsApp link.

manage.title: Manage with peace of mind
manage.description: Dues, meetings, finances — it all becomes simple.

q1.question: Is AssoHub really free?
q1.answer: Yes, AssoHub is entirely free at launch. You can create your organization, add your members, and manage your dues at no cost.

q2.question: Is my data secure?
q2.answer: Your data is stored securely and only accessible to authorized members of your organization. You stay in full control and can delete it at any time.

q3.question: Is it complicated to use?
q3.answer: Not at all. AssoHub is designed to be simple, even without technical skills. If you know how to use WhatsApp, you'll know how to use AssoHub.

q4.question: Can I manage several associations?
q4.answer: Yes. You can create and manage several organizations from a single account, and switch between them in one click.

q5.question: How do my members pay their dues?
q5.answer: You record payments received via Orange Money, MTN MoMo, PayCard, Soutra Money, cash, or bank transfer. AssoHub automatically tracks who's paid and who's late.

finalCta.title: Ready to simplify your association's management?
finalCta.subtitle: Join the associations going digital with AssoHub.

footer.tagline: The digital infrastructure for African organizations
